title: Goroutine Pools, Context Causes, Backpressure, and Shutdown · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations review reconstructs goroutine pools, context causes, backpressure, and shutdown from revision, authorization, seed, URL, robots decision, request, response bytes, tree identity, record provenance, frontier transition, goroutine owner, report row, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded leak-free Go crawl pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure.
Assign channel creation, senders, receiver, closer, buffering rationale, and cancellation behavior without double close or blocked send.
Derive owner, run, item, attempt, deadline, and shutdown contexts and preserve the first meaningful cancellation cause.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 5767 during a redirect, DNS, body, and checkpoint fault exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove multiresource backpressure, channel ownership, context causes, error aggregation, and graceful join; release evidence binds source, modules, build settings, binary or image, configuration, policy, and restored state; then change one owner, seed, net/url, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, transport, media, or charset condition and reconcile provenance. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Go team handles case 5053 during a redirect, DNS, body, and checkpoint fault exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove multiresource backpressure, channel ownership, context causes, error aggregation, and graceful join; every URL, body, tree, record, frontier transition, and report row retains causal identity; then change one fuzz, race, mutation, capacity, binary, deployment, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Stop admission, cancel permitted operations, close by owner, await goroutines, flush durable state, close transports, and prove no leak.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Exiting main cleans goroutines and network resources gracefully.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Stop admission, cancel permitted operations, close by owner, await goroutines, flush durable state, close transports, and prove no leak. Artifact under review: bounded leak-free Go crawl pipeline.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner permission, revision, URL and robots policy, body and parser limits, record and graph provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, Colly differences, changed fixtures, privacy, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as Go crawler proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Graceful Join, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Authorized site auditing and Go Record what required effort · Review Graceful Join, keep Graceful Join connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Stop admission, cancel permitted operations, close by owner, await goroutines, flush durable state, close transports, and prove no leak.
